title: Wagner rebels, SCOTUS ends AA, AI M&A, startups gone bad, spacetime warps & more
description:
(0:00) Bestie intros: Friedberg fills in as moderator!

(2:45) Wagner Group rebellion

(23:15) SCOTUS strikes down Affirmative Action

(51:03) Databricks acquires MosaicML for $1.3B, Inflection raises $1.3B

(1:09:35) IRL shuts down after faking 95% of users, Byju's seeks to raise emergency $1B as founder control in jeopardy

(1:26:38) Science Corner: Understanding the NANOGrav findings

analysis.summary: The All-In Podcast discusses various topics including the Wagner Group rebellion, SCOTUS striking down Affirmative Action, and AI M&A deals. They also cover startups gone bad, such as IRL shutting down, and Byju's seeking to raise emergency funds. The episode concludes with a Science Corner segment on understanding the NANOGrav findings.

takeaways.text: IRL shuts down after faking 95% of users

sentiment.notes: The mood is mixed, with discussions on both positive and negative topics, such as AI M&A deals and startups shutting down.
